studies.title: Feasibility of Priovi, an e-health tool based on schema therapy to treat patients with Borderline Personaility Disorder, as support to face-to-face psychotherapy - a qualitative case study

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates 'priovi', an e-health tool based on schema therapy for treating Borderline Personality Disorder, developed in cooperation with GAIA AG. The product name 'priovi' and the manufacturer 'GAIA AG' are explicitly mentioned in the trial registration and full text.

_classification.reason: The study is a qualitative case study focusing on the feasibility and subjective impressions of an e-health tool, which does not fit the criteria for a primary RCT or RWE study. It lacks randomization and control, and is not an observational study collecting real-world data.

studies._rejection_reason: The study is a qualitative case study focusing on the feasibility and subjective impressions of an e-health tool, which does not fit the criteria for a primary RCT or RWE study. It lacks randomization and control, and is not an observational study collecting real-world data.
